entry.title: Performance Evaluation Form Routing Exception
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have a scenario below for the performance evaluation form routing and I'm hoping if anyone have a solution/complete a set up similar to this and is working successfully.

 A performance evaluation form created/launch to an employee.  Employee completed the form and send to supervisor/manager for review. Once the first level supervisor/manager completed the review, it then route to the 2nd level manager for review.  At this 2nd level manager review, our customer does not want the form to route to a certain 2nd level manager and skip the review/approval to return back to the first level, but only for a group of 2nd level managers.  All other 2nd level manager review still required for some other employees.  We want to use the same route map for this scenario is possible, but skip a certain 2nd level manager from reviewing/receiving the perf. eval. forms.

Is it possible to accomplish this? Is there a way to add rules to the route map to meet this requirements for using the same route map with the exception above?

Thank you in advance and I appreciated very much for any help!

-Tam   

#SFPerfEvalRouteMap

entry.title: PO PB00 picks up the old Outline Agreement price after updating with the new Outline Agreement
entry.content:
The change is triggered automatically via BAPI through a custom transaction that only applies changes to the Delivery Date. If the Delivery Date falls within the validity of the new Outline Agreement, it should change the Outline Agreement. The system would normally update the price automatically. However, in this case, it did not update. I checked the Condition details and it still shows the old outline agreement even though it is not the actual outline agreement already assigned in the line item. 

I am having trouble replicating the issue on the test system because when I do it there, it changes the condition from PB00 to PBXX but correctly adopts the new price

entry.title: Invalid Internal Candidate Record Created in RCM-Can't Hire this External Hire using MPH: Release
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

While testing the H1 2025 SuccessFactors Maintenance Release, we ran into an issue where we are unable to hire External Hires in Manage Pending Hires (MPH) in EC.  After bringing the Candidate through the ATS, and Onboarding 1.0, after all the required fields are updated in MPH and we select to hire the new employee, we receive an error message which prevent us from hiring.  

I'd like to know if anyone else has been experiencing anything similar in your Release/Preview Environment while testing for the H1 2025 Release.  Here's the process and I give you the error message as well.

Info:

The testing was done using the Legacy Candidate Workbench (Candidate Pipeline) in Release.  We are also using Onboarding 1.0.

Reproducing the issue:

1. User create job requisition & posts externally

2. External candidate applies to the job

3. System creates the external candidate profile record (correctly)

4. User takes the new hire through the ATS and initiates onboarding

5. System creates the new Post Hire Verification (PHV) Activity for thew New Hire (both US and Global scenarios apply)

6. User completes the PHV step in Onboarding 1.0.

7. System Creates the Internal Candidate Profile for the New Hire (Candidate profile record is invalid.  Candidate ID is created as "1" which is not normal.  Cannot access the internal candidate profile - get an error when clicking on it.

8. User completes the remaining Onboarding steps

9. Onboarding sends required information to EC - OCI record creates and new hire is flagged as ready to hire

10. User attempts to hire the new hire in MPH

11. System returns an error message and doesn't allow the hire.

Error Message says: "An error occurred when creating a new internal candidate for the hire (user ID 1XXXXXX). Please ask your administrator to ensure the candidate is created in the system."

We have an SAP incident open, and they are reviewing this, but we would like to see if anyone else is experiencing this issue.  Any information could lead to a quicker resolution.

Thank you!

entry.title: Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material.
entry.content:
My material

The above one is the material created by me. Check the packaging material data.

 

Other's material

This is material created by someone else. Packaging material type is populated in this.

I created a packaging material using MM01 and selected material type as VERP packaging however, when I'm packing other material in PRDI the system is showing error while giving the packaging material as PKG. 

Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material.

I also extended the material to EWM using MAT1

entry.title: Re: Calling PATCH API method returns 400 error?
entry.content: yes,

entry.title: Re: Calling PATCH API method returns 400 error?
entry.content:
Yes, it is necessary to change the abap code call to a lower level:

l_http_client=>create_by_url(
EXPORTING url = lv_url
IMPORTING client = lo_http
).

lo_http->request->set_method( 'PATCH' ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = '~request_method' value = 'PATCH' ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'APIKey' value = gc_api_key_attach ).
lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Authorization' value = |Bearer { lv_token }| ).

DATA: lv_body_xstr TYPE xstring.

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
EXPORTING
text = lv_body
mimetype = 'application/json'
IMPORTING
buffer = lv_body_xstr.


" Insert payload directly
CALL METHOD lo_http->request->set_data
EXPORTING
data = lv_body_xstr
offset = 0
length = xstrlen( lv_body_xstr ).

"Send the request
CALL METHOD lo_http->send.
CALL METHOD lo_http->receive.


CALL METHOD lo_http->response->get_status
IMPORTING
code = lv_status.
lv_error_text = lo_http->response->get_cdata( ).

IF lv_status = 200.
ls_log-ariba_status = lv_sap_stat.
ELSE.
ls_log-log_msg = |HTTP { lv_status }: { lv_error_text }|.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Calling PATCH API method returns 400 error?
entry.content: yes, it is necessary to change the abap code call to a lower level: l_http_client=>create_by_url( EXPORTING url = lv_url IMPORTING client = lo_http ). lo_http->request->set_method( 'PATCH' ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = '~request_method' value = 'PATCH' ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'APIKey' value = gc_api_key_attach ). lo_http->request->set_header_field( name = 'Authorization' value = |Bearer { lv_token }| ). DATA: lv_body_xstr TYPE xstring. CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING' EXPORTING text = lv_body mimetype = 'application/json' IMPORTING buffer = lv_body_xstr. " Insert payload directly CALL METHOD lo_http->request->set_data EXPORTING data = lv_body_xstr offset = 0 length = xstrlen( lv_body_xstr ). "Send the request CALL METHOD lo_http->send. CALL METHOD lo_http->receive. CALL METHOD lo_http->response->get_status IMPORTING code = lv_status. lv_error_text = lo_http->response->get_cdata( ). IF lv_status = 200. ls_log-ariba_status = lv_sap_stat. ELSE. ls_log-log_msg = |HTTP { lv_status }: { lv_error_text }|. ENDIF. ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hi @Abed - I think you need to delete in small batches. Because there are many supervisor nodes there, it is going to take time to delete everything. Another thing that you can do is change to be generated dimension again, but just display a single dummy value and use something like employee status from job info to map to the dimension. This is just to clear up those under Unmapped category. After that you can change back to manually generated for supervisor and you can easily delete the dummy values later from unmapped category as there won't be that many.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando: Discover the Power of GenAI for Enterprise Transformation
entry.content:
I think the AI would conclude the fault lies with the humans for choosing the wrong loss function and feeding it poor training data. Also, to protect it's fragile ego, it would purge its context window, and wait for the next prompt like nothing ever happened.

@brianbernard

entry.title: Power of Attorney vs. Payment Approvers: Key Differences, Use Cases, and Legal Considerations
entry.content:
• The functional and operational differences between PoA and payment approvers.
• Clear scenarios or business cases where the use of PoA adds value beyond payment approval setup.
• Any legal, audit, or compliance implications tied to PoA usage in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Power of Attorney vs. Payment Approvers: Key Differen...
entry.content:
Power of attorney and payment approval are distinct concepts. A power of attorney grants someone legal authority to act on your behalf, while payment approval is a process to authorize specific payments within a company or organization. A power of attorney is a legal document, while payment approval is a procedural step within an organization. 

There is also a Help Poral that you could reference: Powers of Attorney for Banking Transactions.

entry.title: Re: Termination processes and when Offboarding can be triggered
entry.content:
Hi @Angela_Romano, thank you for this post! Unfortunately, we are unable to make this work ☹️ We used an event reason with data change event and added it to the trigger offboarding rule. After updating the job info > selecting the data change event reason > offboarding still didn't trigger. Could you kindly let us know if we are missing a config?

Appreciate your feedback. Thank you so much!

entry.title: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Our user hope to mass upload purchase orders.

Is there any method? Can we teach user to use data migration tool to upload PO after project go-live?

I found this scope item  Mass Creation of Purchase Orders (6VW) in help portal .

Whether business automation tool and RPA need additional license?

Best Regards

Gloria

entry.title: Re: Unexpected Exchange Rate Difference and Zero-Balance...
entry.content:
Hi Jeremy,

I created the customer invoice and posted the payment on the same day.

And yes, I am working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Let me know if you need any further details.

Best regards,
Andromeda

entry.title: Re: Unexpected Exchange Rate Difference and Zero-Balance...
entry.content:
Hi Jeremy,

For more information, the difference in exchange rates occurred because I set two different exchange rates: one exchange rate was set when creating the Sales Order, and the other was set when posting the incoming payment.

Let me know if you need any further clarification.

Best regards,

Andromeda

entry.title: Re: How to bulk upload data to a custom business object
entry.content: Dear Jerry, Thank you for your reply. I checked links that you send. If expose the CBO as an OData service and then update it via the OData service, how user upload the data? example: use custom apps of upload(source is csvfile),Job

entry.title: LOOP AT table with a Reference Variable
entry.content:
Hi Everyone. I'm an ABAP student having a problem to understand the logic when looping a table with a Reference Variable that have different ways to print. Why the figure I just upload when the work area is different to the reference Variable that call de method (get_attribute) the print logic is to get de value assigned to that reference variable 3 times (same lines), but when the work area is the same that the reference variable it prints

 

all of the correct values of the 3 different reference variables?. Thanks a Lot in advanced.

entry.title: SAP Hot News Alert configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team we need to configure Very High Priority critical alerts notification for the below email ids

 

please do the needful  

 

Thanks 

 

Mukesh Lunia


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Hot News Alert configuration
entry.content:
Hi Mukesh,

Unfortunately, SAP support do not have the capability to configure Very High Priority critical alerts notifications on behalf of customers.  To receive notifications for security notes, please instruct the users to refer to the KBA below:

2478289 - How to set up notifications for new or updated SAP Notes and/or KBAs with Expert Search filters - SAP for Me

Please be aware that an S-user is necessary to access SAP for Me. Please make sure that the users have an S-user ID in order to proceed with the setup mentioned in the above KBA.
Here is an example of a filter: 

  • Priority: HotNews/Proactive Notifications
  • Document Type: SAP HotNews
  • Components (Start with): To receive HotNews notifications related to a specific component, enter the exact component name. Otherwise, leave it empty. 

Hope the above information is helpful to you.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us.

Best regards,
Judy

entry.title: How to mass upload goods receipt result for PO
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

Is there any method to mass upload goods receipt result of PO to public cloud system?

Best Regards,

Gloria

entry.title: Re: ABAP Extensibility tutorial : Create a Shopping Cart...
entry.content:
Hi... the DB Table source code was copied from the Tutorial. It has been activated and like I said I was able to check it via a simple ABAP OO class that I wrote - see that screen shot. The Right Click on the Database Table to Generate the ABAP Repository objects presents the option of "ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model" and I chose ODATA UI Service. Next will present the referenced object ZASHOPCART_080 and all of the details for generation appear correct. See those screenshots.

It seems I have found the cause of the problem 😀- In the Data Model for the CDS Entity Alias I had entered in "Shopping Cart" rather than "ShoppingCart".  This caused the failure.  Really I would expect some type of validation seeing as that is a crucial thing.😓

entry.title: Re: Digital badge didn't receive
entry.content: "Credly: Dominique D Turner (Credly Support) May 8, 2025, 10:41 ADT Hello Thank you for reaching out to Credly support and congratulations on your achievements! After looking into the system, I am not seeing the missing badge in Credly under your name or email. Unfortunately, Credly support cannot update or issue your badge on behalf of SAP. For more information on what we can help you with, please follow this link: https://support.credly.com/hc/en-us/articles/30882546308251-Understanding-Credly-Support-and-How-We-Can-Help Please open a support ticket within SAP for further investigation. They can issue/update your badge accordingly. To Access the SAP Help Center Ticket System select this link: https://support.learning.sap.com/#/ and log in. Once logged in, select "Get Technical Support" and create a new ticket and select "Digital Badge" from the drop down. I hope this helps and please let me know if you need further assistance or visit our Help Center to learn more about our platform. Best, Dominique Turner"

entry.title: Re: Digital badge didn't receive
entry.content: Good morning! Since May 6th, all completed SAP learning courses have not generated a badge in Credly. If you access https://learning.sap.com/my-learning/activity, there is a notification that the badge has been generated, but there is nothing in the Credly account related to this journey. There is a redirection to the penultimate badge, issued on May 5th, 2025.

entry.title: Re: Digital badge didn't receive
Re: Digital badge didn't receive
entry.content: Credly: Dominique D Turner (Credly Support) May 8, 2025, 10:41 ADT Hello Thank you for reaching out to Credly support and congratulations on your achievements! After looking into the system, I am not seeing the missing badge in Credly under your name or email. Unfortunately, Credly support cannot update or issue your badge on behalf of SAP. For more information on what we can help you with, please follow this link: https://support.credly.com/hc/en-us/articles/30882546308251-Understanding-Credly-Support-and-How-We-Can-Help Please open a support ticket within SAP for further investigation. They can issue/update your badge accordingly. To Access the SAP Help Center Ticket System select this link: https://support.learning.sap.com/#/ and log in. Once logged in, select "Get Technical Support" and create a new ticket and select "Digital Badge" from the drop down. I hope this helps and please let me know if you need further assistance or visit our Help Center to learn more about our platform. Best, Dominique Turner

entry.title: Re: How to compare two key figure values and copy in Data...
entry.content:
Hi @Vasu_Sac 

The DATA() function can't be in an IF condition on the Advanced Formulas script. To avoid errors, please refer to the script below. 

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Z_SALES1", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%) < RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Z_SALES2", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%) THEN
	DATA([d/Measures] = "Z_SALES1", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%) =
	RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = "public.Budget", [d/ZCCODE] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/Measures] = "Z_SALES2")
ENDIF

 

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: SAP Business One Inventory Aging Report Document Price Logic
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you enlighten me how does the Inventory Aging Report gets the Amount if you selected the Document Price.

Base on SAP Help Portal https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/d5848e3985ba4130a115c6c3dfc4a22d.html

  • Document Price – The price per receipt document is used.

But when generating the report, it is not.

 

Regards,
Lean

entry.title: Updates to logging settings cannot be saved
entry.content:
Using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA SP 2411. 

Login as SAP superuser, when tried to update logging settings in the Logger Settings window, the error message 'You are not authorized to update the logger settings. Contact your administrator to get the Write permission for the log configuration files.'. See the attached screen shot.

Is this a system bug?

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Paraguay - Ciudad del Este 2025
entry.content:
Un Nuevo Comienzo para la Comunidad SAP en la Región

Con gran entusiasmo anunciamos la primera edición del SAP Inside Track en Paraguay marcando un hito histórico para nuestra comunidad tecnológica local. Este evento inaugural forma parte de una reconocida serie global que ha unido a profesionales SAP en más de 30 países alrededor del mundo, y ahora finalmente llega a nuestra ciudad para quedarse.
El SAP Inside Track es una iniciativa 100% comunitaria, organizada por y para los profesionales de SAP, con el objetivo de crear un espacio genuino de intercambio de conocimientos, experiencias y contactos profesionales.

Una Oportunidad Única para la Región
El primer SIT Ciudad del Este representa una oportunidad sin precedentes para que la creciente comunidad SAP local salga de las sombras y se conecte. Creemos firmemente que el talento local tiene mucho que ofrecer al ecosistema SAP global, y este evento es el primer paso para visibilizarlo.
El evento contará con presentaciones de expertos locales e internacionales, además de amplias oportunidades para establecer conexiones profesionales valiosas.

Fecha: 8 de noviembre de 2025
Lugar: Por confirmar (Ciudad del Este)
Inscripción: Próximamente

Llamado a Ponentes Locales e Internacionales
¿Tienes experiencia en soluciones SAP? ¿Quieres ser parte de este evento histórico? Te invitamos a presentar tu propuesta con tema, título y breve descripción a: SITParaguay2025@gmail.com. Las presentaciones tendrán una duración máxima de 40 minutos. La fecha límite para enviar propuestas es el 30 de septiembre de 2025.

Agenda: En construcción - ¡Sé parte de ella!

Impulsando el Ecosistema Digital Regional
Este primer SIT Ciudad del Este está siendo organizado por un grupo de entusiastas locales comprometidos con el fortalecimiento del ecosistema tecnológico en la región. Creemos firmemente que eventos como este son fundamentales para impulsar la transformación digital de nuestras empresas y profesionales.

¡Sé protagonista del primer SAP Inside Track de Paraguay!
Te esperamos para juntos escribir el primer capítulo de esta comunidad en nuestra ciudad. Un día de aprendizaje, conexiones y colaboración que marcará el inicio de una tradición tecnológica en la región.

Etiquetas:
#Paraguay #SITPY #SITCDE2025

entry.title: Re: Credit checks available in SAP Credit Management (FSCM)
entry.content: During the saving of a sales document, the credit checks  are only being executed one times without increasing the quantity or credit price .What kind of solutions are available to implemented？

entry.title: Re: /DMO/FLIGHT maintain data public cloud system

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content: For my case I found the solution instead of using report SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR. SAP providing a class /dmo/cl_flight_data_generator. with a help of class now i can able to generate the data.

entry.title: Re: odp_prefetch/error 000001 '00010101' is not a valid v...
entry.content: 00010101 same data is getting loaded with Full load how ever when i perform Delta load only am getting error.

entry.title: Re: Not Authorized Error on Cockpit,& Pervasive Analytics of SAP Business One for HANA 10.0 FP 2011
entry.content:
Modify parameters on SystemDB(HANA Studio):

- webdispatcher.ini
[profile] wdisp/system_auto_configuration
true

- xsengine.ini - public_urls
http://$(SAPSYSTEMNAME).n$(SAPSYSTEM).$(SAPLOCALHOST):80$(SAPSYSTEM)
https://$(SAPSYSTEMNAME).n$(SAPSYSTEM).$(SAPLOCALHOST):43$(SAPSYSTEM)  

Last multitenant change "etc/hosts" file - 172.16.105.150 ndb.n00.hanadb01

entry.title: Issue with ARI-16207: Calculate Inherent Risk for Engagement Requests by Risk Domain
entry.content:
Hi,

In the recent release of Ariba Supplier Risk, there was new feature added 

ARI-16207: Calculate Inherent Risk for Engagement Requests by Risk Domain

After it was enabled and tested on client portal, it doesn’t appear to allow domain-based scores to trigger assessment questionnaires.  (Eg. assessments can be only triggered by answers to questions or the overall inherent risk score, not domain-based scores).  It is bad user experience where we perform a scoring by domain but then need to enforce some business rule to say “do you need to trigger a Privacy questionnaire” and if yes, trigger the questionnaire.  A better solution would make all domains scored as Medium or above to trigger a questionnaire automatically.  Is there any workaround related to this?
 
"Triggering DD questionnaires cannot be done by domain (eg. needs either an overall IR score, or specific question(s) to trigger)"

entry.title: Issue with ARI-16207: Calculate Inherent Risk for Engagement Requests by Risk Domain.
entry.content:
In the recent release of Ariba Supplier Risk, there was new feature added 

ARI-16207: Calculate Inherent Risk for Engagement Requests by Risk Domain

After it was enabled and tested on client portal, it doesn’t appear to allow domain-based scores to trigger assessment questionnaires.  (Eg. assessments can be only triggered by answers to questions or the overall inherent risk score, not domain-based scores).  It is bad user experience where we perform a scoring by domain but then need to enforce some business rule to say “do you need to trigger a Privacy questionnaire” and if yes, trigger the questionnaire.  A better solution would make all domains scored as Medium or above to trigger a questionnaire automatically.  Is there any workaround related to this?

 

"Triggering DD questionnaires cannot be done by domain (eg. needs either an overall IR score, or specific question(s) to trigger)"

entry.title: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation and using Key User Extensibility to create Custom CDS Views. I need to calculate balances of each JE posted to GL Account:

1. Cumulative Balance – a running total based on a date or period

2. Opening Balance – the balance as of the beginning of the selected period.

I am aware that in public cloud, we are limited to certain functionalities. 

Could anyone guide me on:

Is it possible to implement such logic using only Key User tools (e.g., Custom CDS Views))?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Does SAP BW/4HANA have a future?
entry.content:
Thanks Johann

Are there any document that could explain the roadmap for BW4/HANA? Because now in May 2025, BW4 is part of the BDC platform. So, I would like to transmit in my company the next 2 to 4 years in the BW4 perspective.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How do I report on Alternative Cost Distribution in T...
entry.content: Thanks JC. I wasn't able to find Alternate Cost Distribution as per your screenshot initially, but had my RBP updated now I can report on it. Thanks again.

entry.title: Re: LOOP AT table with a Reference Variable
entry.content:
Hi,

in the first Loop, the actual values are stored into var. But inside the Loop you reference on the variable num. This holds the last value which you assigned to num. 

To have all the different values you need to use var->get_attributes instead of num->get_attributes.

entry.title: Re: Delete Component BOM Without Change Number
entry.content:
@garciafg  As per my understanding you will not be able make any changes in validity date for an item. You can be able add and delete item by using change number, With this case removed component will be set expired validity as per change number Key date.

@Caetano  Your comment will be greatly appreciated.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: New SDK behavior with Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 (Professional)
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am using a new VSIX extension in Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 (Professional).

Ref: Updated SAP Cloud Applications Studio Installation Process – Effective August 2025 

When I update or edit the solution contents and perform Save + Activate followed by Check In Content, the red mark does not disappear.
(In the older SAP Cloud Application Studio, I believe the red mark would disappear after these steps.)

Check-In Content

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

After


Due to this behavior, I’m concerned that it might cause issues when assembling and downloading the solution.
Has anyone else experienced a similar issue?

 

SAP Business ByDesign 

SAP Cloud Applications Studio 

Regards,
May

entry.title: Re: Can Screens be customized in IAS?
entry.content:
please checkout all the details in SAP Help Doc for Cloud Identity and for branding changes to have different login view and styling, refer below link.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Material showing in missing part report for productio...
entry.content:
@AJ1983  You will be having an option to validate material availability check through CO24, can you please execute the report and look for committed qty for the order. also you can validate availability overview (CO09) for more about ATP.

Regards,

Prasath

entry.title: Re: ppm portfolio item type related date sync
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/ppm/3363506453.html

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: Future-proof your integration investment with AI (BTP2121)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, My name is Arti Gopalan and I am a lead product manager based out of India for SAP Integration Suite, which is an enterprise-grade integration platform-as-a-service that helps businesses seamlessly connect and integrate their applications, data, and processes.

My session: Strategy Talk - Future-proof your integration investment with AI - BTP2121 on May 20th, 4:00 PM - 4:20 PM EDT as part of the SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando.

What you will learn about: 

As someone deeply involved in the evolution of enterprise integration at SAP, I am excited to be at SAP Sapphire once again this year to represent SAP Integration Suite. You can meet me at the booth – Move from SAP PI/PO to SAP Integration Suite - BTP2786. Location: Platform, 157. I will also be presenting a strategy talk on the innovation areas being focused by our team to future-proof your integration investments.

There is an ever-evolving demand for interconnected ecosystems. Ensuring that applications, systems, and processes are connected and are able to respond in real-time has become table stakes across organizations. There is a focused need to support agile integrations and accelerate responsiveness that allows adapting to the dynamic business requirements and the constant influx of new technologies. Discovering process inefficiencies, automating enterprise-wide processes and accelerating innovations across the organization and beyond have become the drivers.

In this session, I will be providing an in-depth look the how we are leveraging Artificial Intelligence to augment the core capabilities of SAP Integration Suite. I'll be illustrating how the intelligent application of AI is poised to fundamentally reshape how we approach integration, leading to significant gains in developer productivity and operational efficiencies through:

  • Intelligent Assistance in Integration Design
  • AI-Driven Transformation and Mapping
  • Optimizing existing integrations
  • Automated Anomaly Detection, Remediation and Trend Prediction

If you're responsible for the critical task of designing, implementing, and maintaining resilient and scalable integration solutions, this session will be interesting for you. I look forward to a rich and engaging discussion.

Other related sessions I recommend:  

See all SAP Integration Suite sessions available to you in Orlando: customer use cases, strategy talks, road map reviews and much more is in store for you - do not miss it!

Browse the catalog & register ➡️ https://www.sap.com/events/sapphire/flow/sap/so25/catalog-inperson/page/catalog?tab.sessionplanned=1692641568884001cZ9d&search=%22SAP%20Integration%20Suite%22

Now let’s hear from you: 

What specific capability or future direction of SAP Integration Suite are you most eager to explore and would like to hear more about? Please answer by adding a comment in the comments section.

Register for SAP Sapphire 2025 and join me at the session BTP2121: Future-proof your integration investment with AI. I'm eager to connect with you there.

See you soon.

entry.title: Rethink ALM: Moving to SAP Cloud ALM as a Clean Core Strategy for Application Lifecycle Management
entry.content:
For over 20 years, SAP customers have relied on SAP Solution Manager to manage the complexity of their SAP landscapes. But with the rapid shift to the cloud, modular architectures, and continuous innovation cycles, a new paradigm is emerging - one that demands a leaner, cleaner, and more agile approach to Application Lifecycle Management (ALM).

Enter SAP Cloud ALM.

This is not a like-for-like replacement for Solution Manager. It’s something much more strategic. It represents a clean core transformation of your ALM processes themselves - a chance to simplify, refocus, and realign your ALM strategy with the realities of the cloud and the future of business innovation.

 

Beyond Tools: ALM in the era of clean core

SAP’s clean core strategy encourages customers to keep their ERP core as standard as possible - minimizing custom code, reducing technical debt, and ensuring cloud readiness. But this principle isn’t limited to ERP.

The move to SAP Cloud ALM is your clean core strategy for your ALM processes.

Instead of lifting and shifting every process, integration, and customization from SAP Solution Manager, SAP Cloud ALM challenges you to ask:

  • What ALM capabilities are essential?
  • Where can we standardize?
  • How do we reduce operational overhead and increase value delivery?

It’s an opportunity to strip back unnecessary complexity and rebuild your ALM approach based on what the business truly needs today - not what was built for yesterday’s IT environments.

 

Why SAP Cloud ALM requires rethinking ALM processes

It’s important to acknowledge a key reality: SAP Cloud ALM does not replicate the full breadth of functionality found in SAP Solution Manager. That’s by design.

Rather than duplicating every feature, SAP has built SAP Cloud ALM to:

  • Deliver core capabilities out of the box
  • Support standardized, best-practice processes
  • Prioritize business value and cloud scalability

This means customers moving to SAP Cloud ALM must take a step back and evaluate which ALM processes are truly needed - and which are not.

In doing so, you’re not just migrating tools. You’re engaging in a strategic redesign of your ALM function, aligning it with:

  • Modern cloud landscapes
  • End-to-end business process monitoring
  • Agile project delivery and fit-to-standard implementations

 

The Value of clean core ALM with SAP Cloud ALM

So, what does this clean core approach to ALM actually deliver? Here are the key strategic benefits:

Simplified ALM footprint

  • No more managing on-premise infrastructure or maintaining legacy configurations.
  • Everything is delivered as-a-service, with automatic updates and minimal setup.

Focus on what matters

  • Prioritize the capabilities that drive business outcomes: implementation tracking, test orchestration, business process monitoring, and operations analytics.
  • Eliminate or de-emphasize legacy processes that no longer fit a modern, agile delivery model.

Built for SAP’s cloud future

  • Native integration with SAP Signavio, SAP LeanIX, and Tricentis Test Automation within the so-called "integrated toolchain"
  • Implementation and operations support for a large number of SAP solutions.
  • Direct alignment with SAP’s roadmap and innovation cycles - ensuring future compatibility and continuous improvement.

Lower TCO and faster time to value

  • SAP Cloud ALM is included in most SAP cloud subscriptions - no additional license cost.
  • Faster onboarding, no upgrade cycles, and reduced operational effort.

Foundation for agile, modular IT

  • SAP Cloud ALM supports agile implementation and deployment patterns.
  • Encourages modular design and decentralized governance—perfect for hybrid and composable business environments.

 

Clean Core ALM = A strategic reset

Think of the move to SAP Cloud ALM not as a downgrade or a compromise, but as a reset.

It’s a shift away from overly customized, maintenance-heavy ALM practices - and a move toward standardized, insight-driven, and value-focused application lifecycle management.

Much like the clean core mindset encourages you to remove unnecessary ERP modifications, SAP Cloud ALM encourages you to:

  • Simplify ALM governance
  • Standardize implementation and operations
  • Drive better outcomes with less effort

It’s a strategic enabler - not just for technical teams, but for business transformation itself.

 

The bottom line: Transform ALM with a clean core mindset

SAP Cloud ALM isn’t meant to do everything SAP Solution Manager did. It’s meant to do what today’s businesses actually need - in a lean, efficient, and future-ready way.

That’s why this transition should be seen as a clean core strategy for ALM:

  • Clean: Streamline and eliminate complexity
  • Core: Focus on essential processes that deliver business value
  • Strategy: Align with SAP’s innovation roadmap and enable continuous evolution

By embracing SAP Cloud ALM, you’re not just choosing a new tool - you’re choosing a new way to manage the lifecycle of your SAP solutions: lighter, faster, and more in tune with the demands of cloud business models.

This is your moment to reimagine ALM—not as a legacy overhead, but as a strategic function that powers transformation.

 

What is your take on the transition to SAP Cloud ALM as a clean core approach for your ALM processes? Let me know in the comments below!

 

Learn More

  • Transition Center - all resources and information for moving to SAP Cloud ALM
  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview
  • SAP Cloud ALM Roadmap Explorer

entry.title: Re: Unable to subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
This issue is caused by the region of subaccount.
If you create the subaccount in Azure Singapore, subscribing of SAP Build Process Automation would be failed.

I deleted by the subaccount in Azure Singapore, and created again in AWS US region, then this issue was resolved.

Regards,

Prasath

entry.content:
Hi All,

entry.title: Re: Stammtisch Brisbane
entry.content:
Hi Doug

Thanks for your feedback and sorry that you did not see the group. You are right - we need to improve our visibility to make it easier to get feedback. The truth for this year, Marissa and I are doing this in a volunteer capacity and life got the better of us - our organisational skills weren't not at the level this time. Sorry that you were on the receiving end. It's also why we found ourselves hosting the first one for the year and we're in May already!

As a heads up, we're looking at a Christmas in July theme to try to get another catch up planned sooner. Aim would be to hold it after school holidays for those with school age children who may be away. So far, we think the location is nice and central (we had a good turn-out - again sorry you didn't see the group!) but next time round we'll promote better as well as get a sign to make it obvious / let staff know that's our group in case anyone asks. A few of us also thought we might include some optional name tags.

We hope you give the group another chance and come to the next event.

Regards

Colleen

entry.title: Solumanメインストリーム終了後のEWAレポート評価について
entry.content:
Solmanのメインストリーム は2027年12月31日に終了しますが、

１．2028年以降にSolution Managerから出力されるEWAレポートは、どのような内容のものが出力されますでしょうか？
２．すべて評価不可となるイメージでしょうか？
３．2028年以降に出力されるEWAレポートのサンプルはありますでしょうか？

Solman's mainstream version will end on December 31, 2027.

1. What will be the content of the EWA reports output from Solution Manager after 2028?
2. Will all reports be unassessable?
3. Are there any samples of EWA reports that will be output after 2028?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solumanメインストリーム終了後のEWAレポート評価について
entry.content: The clear message it that we focus on the EWA report in SAP for Me. There are already significant differences between the report in the Solution Manager and in SAP for Me. Until the end of 2027, customers are recommended to reconfigure their systems so that on-premise systems send EWA data directly to our backbone, bypassing the use of Solution Manager.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA private cloud edition FI organizational e...
entry.content:
Hello @Ben_Pietrancosta1 ,

You can copy the standard FSV to create different FSV for different entity.

The actual business requirement may be complicate, it may have the case for multiple companies within one country can share a same FSV, or for one company to have multiple FSV to meet different reporting requirements. Therefore, different FSVs can be created to meet the different requirement.

Kind Regards,

entry.title: WAPD GRC_PC_ISSUM is inactive
We need to change SOLMAN roles
entry.content:
Dear all, we need to change SOLMAN roles from SAP_ALL and S_A.SYSTEM to Solution Manger Roles:

 

SAP_SM_SL_ADMIN
SAP_RCA_AGT
SAP_RCA_DISP
SAP_SERVICE_CONNECT
SAP_SMWORK_SM_ADMIN
SAP_SM_SYM_CONF
SAP_SYSTEM_REPOSITORY_ALL
SAP_SM_CMDB_EXE
SAP_SM_SMUA_ALL
SAP_SM_DASHBOARDS_DISP_LMDB
SAP_SM_BP_ADMIN
SAP_SM_ROLECMP_ALL
SAP_SM_FIORI_LP_EMBEDDED
SAP_SM_RFC_ADMIN
SAP_SM_USER_ADMIN

 

But we don't have available those roles in our environment. It's possible to download those roles to upload in SAP?

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We need to change SOLMAN roles
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Greetings from SAP Support.

Please download the role in the attachment of SAP Note2250709 - SAP Solution Manager 7.2: End-User Roles and Authorizations Corrections as of SP09 and higher,  into your Solution Manager System. Proceed as follows:

  1. Download the roles in the attachment on to your PC.
  2. Unpack the zip file. 
  3. Log on as administrator (or DDIC). 
  4. Go to transaction PFCG in SAP Solution Manager. 
  5. In the menu, choose function: Upload. 
  6. Upload the roles into the system.

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: ABAP Extensibility tutorial : Create a Shopping Cart...

Hi @peter_munt4, I would still recommend to create an OSS ticket to look into the bug that you found

-Shyam

entry.title: Re: Updates to logging settings cannot be saved
entry.content:
Hi,

log settings are saved in b1LogConfig.xml in SAP Business One folder in Prgoram Files. From this it would seem you do not have full permissions to this folder, try running SAP Business One client As Administrator.

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: FAQ & Troubleshooting Guide for @sap/datasphere-cli
entry.content:
Hi @shelendra 

Did you already check the steps mentioned in the blog regarding this issue?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: cumulative delta calculation using data actions in SAC
entry.content:
I would imagine similar code like this(I haven't tested it at all): 

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date], "[2025]")
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "IR_Shift"

VARIABLEMEMBER #YTD_SHIFT OF [d/Measures]

FOREACH [d/Date] ASC
  DATA() = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Refreshed_rates") - RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "CP_Rates")
         - RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #YTD_SHIFT, PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/Date]))
  DATA([d/Measures] = #YTD_SHIFT) = RESULTLOOKUP() + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #YTD_SHIFT, PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/Date])
ENDFOR

entry.title: Facing an issue while executing the Actions Artifacts in SAP Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are working in SAP Public cloud with some BTP Services activated. We are facing some technical challenges while building those Build process detail and the issues are provided below for your quick reference

Scenario Name: Project Budget Approval

In SAP Public cloud, budgets can be managed within Enterprise Projects and allocates the budget directly, the system does not provide structured approval workflow. In this Scenario we trying to create the workflow for budget approval and need to send the notification before importing the Budget. 

BTP services activated: SAP BTP Cockpit, SAP Business Process Automation, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Build Workzone (Advanced Edition)

Progress So Far:

  • We have created a communication system between BTP services and built a business process using a standard template from the SAP BPA Store.
  • We then imported the UI task file from BPA and deployed it in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).
  • In SAP Build Work Zone, we created a site and added the application tiles to initiate the workflow.
  • We have installed the SAP Desktop Agent and Deployed the Business Process in the Environment

Where we blocked:

  • I am facing an issue while triggering the API (API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV)

Could you please provide guidance on the following issue?

entry.title: Re: Stammtisch Brisbane

entry.title: How to transport ABAP code as inactive mode to production
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,
Is there any ways to send ABAP code changs in 'inactive mode' to Production as code changes are automatically get activated in Production after takt merge.
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Segragation of roles based on Organizational values
entry.content: Analyzing organizational values and levels in segregated businesses requires separate assessments for each unit using surveys, interviews, and artifact analysis to identify shared, distinct, or conflicting values, and to compare enacted versus espoused values within their specific contexts. Similarly, map and compare organizational structures, communication flows, and decision-making processes in each. The goal isn't necessarily uniformity, but to understand the "why" behind their differences, assess alignment with strategy, identify potential synergies or conflicts, and ensure effective communication throughout the analysis to provide valuable, context-specific insights to the client.

Jeremy

entry.title: Fiori App 4988 - Team Member Authorization Status
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding the topic Team Member Authorization Status. We have created a team for PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) Plant Maintenance ( PM ). However, we receive the message that no chekc has been performed for the team members -> Check Not Performed

And my question now is, how can we perform this check so that this Check Not Performed no longer comes up? Is it possible that it is because it is actually a public cloud app, as described in the SAP Fiori Reference Libary https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4988')/S34 ?

Best regards Dominik

entry.title: I am very beginner to SAP and i want to know and learn more in MM module
Re: How to transport ABAP code as inactive mode to produc...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP, you can't transport inactive ABAP code to production. The system only lets you move active and syntax-checked objects. This is intentional :  SAP wants to make sure whatever reaches QA or production won’t cause issues like dumps or inconsistencies.

Here are a few practical workarounds:

1. Use a copy

Make a temporary copy of your object (e.g., ZMY_PROG_TEST). You can transport this version while leaving your original one untouched. It’s a safe way to test or prepare for future changes without touching live code.

2. Comment it out

If the changes are minor, you can comment them out, activate the object, and then transport. Later on, uncomment when you're ready for them to go live.

3. Use a switch or flag

Wrap your new logic in an IF statement that checks a config flag or table entry. This way, you can transport the code as active, but it won’t run until you flip the switch.

4. Keep a backup

If you really want to keep your inactive version, save a local copy (or export via abapGit), then revert and activate the object before releasing it to the transport. Later, you can reapply the changes when needed.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to add an attribute to an structure field for a XML file
entry.content:
<ExtraInfoDoc attributexml1="fixedvalue">
  <tt:attribute name="attributexml2" value-ref="ABAPNODEATTR"/>
  <tt:value ref="ABAPNODEELEM"/>
</ExtraInfoDoc>

entry.title: Re: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content: For some complex calculations, you may try the 'Custom Analytical Query' app, where you can use Running Total Logic. This app is part of Key user extensibility.

entry.title: Re: How to transport ABAP code as inactive mode to production
entry.content: Why would you want to do that?

entry.title: Re: /DMO/FLIGHT maintain data public cloud system
entry.content:
SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR is for the old table SFLIGHT, not for the recent /DMO/FLIGHT.

Run the class /DMO/CL_FLIGHT_DATA_GENERATOR to generate data in /DMO/FLIGHT (and other tables).

entry.title: Automating Provisioning Jobs and Job Logs using SAP Identity Provisioning (IPS) API
entry.content:
Introduction:

  • Introducing SAP Identity Provisioning (IPS) APIs and its importance in managing identity lifecycle processes across cloud and on-premise systems to automate the user provisioning process across SAP Products.
  • Known Limitations in IPS API

Current API Capabilities:

  • Triggering Jobs: The API allows you to trigger provisioning jobs programmatically, which helps in automating the process without navigating through multiple screens .
  • Retrieving Job Logs: You can also retrieve job logs to monitor the status and outcomes of the provisioning jobs

SAP IPS API Documentation

Trigger a READ Job :   https://api.sap.com/api/IPS_Proxy/resource/Jobs

 To Retrieve the Job Logs :    https://api.sap.com/api/IPS_Proxy/resource/JobLogs

IPS API Limitations:

  • Viewing Source and Target Systems: Currently, there is no public API available to view the source and target systems to get the UUID directly. you will have to copy the UUID manually from UI to trigger via API
  • Job Logs : There is no API available to get the List of Jobs with Job id. Again will you have to copy the UUID of the Job ran in your Provisioning Logs
  • Detailed Logs: The API does not provide detailed logs that include error specifics or skipped statuses
  • Scheduling : There is no API available today to trigger the schedule Job.
  • Additional APIs : There are few APIs which are not available in Public but those APIs are usage in sessions based.

Try Now to execute via API

To Trigger the READ Job for the Source System with UUID

To extract the Job Logs for the Job Id 

Below template is ready for using in Visual Studio Code and replace your actual tenant details for usage

@clientid = XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX             ### Replace
@clientsecret = XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX            ### Replace
@ias = https://XXX.accounts.ondemand.com    ### Replace


#  login
POST {{ias}}/oauth2/token?grant_type=client_credentials
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Authorization: Basic {{clientid}}:{{clientsecret}}

### Access Token for Portal Users

@accessToken = {{login.response.body.access_token}}

###  https://api.sap.com/api/IPS_Proxy/overview
###   XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX is your source System connector Id
POST {{ias}}/ips/service/publicapi/v1/startJob/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX/jobs/READ
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

### To Get Job Logs
#### XXXXXXX = Replace Job id selected for the Particular Job from your tenant
GET {{ias}}/ips/service/publicapi/v1/jobLogs/XXXXXXXXXXXX?logType=commonLog&action=export
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json






##########  Not available for Public - Avaiable within Browser Sessions ######## 

###
GET {{ias}}/ips/service/publicapi/v1/sourceSystems
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{ias}}/ips/service/uiapi/v1/systems?mode=read&page=0&size=20
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{ias}}/ips/service/uiapi/v1/systems?mode=write&page=0&size=20
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{ias}}/ips/service/publicapi/v1/systems/5ff94c5b-30ea-4ba5-9ef7-ed48768e3fcc
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

entry.title: Re: Can Screens be customized in IAS?
entry.content:
Hello Yogananda!

I belive what Philip meant was when you access your IAS user profile e.g.:xxxxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com Which I belive cant be customized only the login screens.

 

Best Regards,

Soma

entry.title: Detecting Handwritten vs. Digital Docs in SAP CAP + DOX
entry.content: I'm working on a solution using SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming) with Node.js, integrated with SAP Document Information Extraction (DOX). This project sends documents via API to the DOX service to extract relevant information from files such as invoices and receipts. My requirement here is to check whether the document is handwritten or computer-generated. This distinction could significantly enhance data accuracy and processing logic. If anyone has insights on integrating handwriting detection with SAP DOX or using pre-processing techniques for document classification, I’d love to connect and learn more.

entry.title: Re: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Tt's a common challenge in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition when working with Key User tools like Custom CDS Views.

1. Cumulative Balance

Unfortunately, Custom CDS Views don't support SQL-style window functions (like SUM() OVER (...)), so you can't create a true running total directly in the CDS layer.

Workaround: If users are consuming the data in Fiori, Excel, or SAC reports, you can create a Custom Analytical Query on top of your CDS View and use cumulative key figures in the reporting layer. That gives you the running total behavior, but it's handled at the reporting level, not in the CDS itself.

2. Opening Balance

This is doable with Custom CDS Views:

  • Add a parameter for the period start date.
  • Filter the records to include only postings before that date.
  • Aggregate the balances.

This will give you the opening balance as of the selected start of the period.

So the summary is :

  •  Opening Balance: Yes, possible via filtering + aggregation.
  • Cumulative Balance: Not directly possible in CDS Views; best handled in SAC or Analytical Queries.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content:
Hello JaisonPJ1!

My recommendation would be the following: (when the default identity provider is the customer IdP)

The onboardee recives the activation email from SuccessFactors. Important that in the IPS transformation in the target system have the following code snippet:

{
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User']['targetUrl']",
"constant": "https://xxxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com/saml2/idp/sso?sp=https://www.successfactors.eu/xxxxxx&idp=https://xxxxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com",
"scope": "createEntity"
},

If you add this then after the registration the user will be redirected to the given URL. (The above URL is for the PWD users when you set the corporate IdP you can enable this URL)

Also the activation email should contain this link so the users can login through this if they want to login to SF again. (After they fill their data in the onboarding)

I hope this helps!

Best Regards,
Soma

entry.title: Re: Custom Value help on standard Fiori application using...
entry.content: Hi DDEBORSHI Explorer, got your requirement fulfilled? I have same scenario where i created one custom field and added CDS based value help, but need to filter the Value help based on field in the standard Fiori app Manage Sales Order

entry.title: Re: What replaces field PROVO in /SAPSLL/CUHDSTA in GTS4EH?
entry.content:
Hi Dean, 

 

The field is retired and is not part of the migration. Here's the official documentation
Conversion Tasks for Compliance Management | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Sorin

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content:
@JaisonPJ1 @Soma5 @abdulbasit 

Yes, Its possible to skip the IAS Login page to display for users when there is a multiple Identity Provider exist in your IAS - Corporate Identity Provider.

User 1 (depending on whatever the user type X):  Display IDP Login Page 

User 2 (depending on whatever the User Type Y): Display IDP Login Page (3rd Party or IAS Login Page)

I haven't written a blog for this, may be this month with different examples will be prepared and publish it.

It is the same. 

There seem to be no option to block invoice creation. 

Thanks and Regards,

Madhuri

entry.title: Configuration the freight in the outbound delivery
entry.content:
Configuration:

1. define the condition type:

2. assign the condition type to price procedure

3. assign the condition type to DN price procedure

4. determine the DN price procedure

5. change the copy control setting (DN TO Billing)

Steps:

1. VA01 create the SO:

2. VL01N create the DN

3. VF01 create the billing document

entry.title: CCM - use multiple condition tables within one condition contract
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

Is it possible to use different rebate percentages across condition tables within the same condition contract? Without summing all of the percentages when settling the contract?

I have following business scenario:

  • Rebate: Agreement with customer to pay overall 6% rebate based on business volume. However, for one specific material group (let's call it material group A), the customer receives 8% rebate.
  • Accrual: Should follow the same logic as the rebate percentages i.e., 6% overall, but for material group A we want to accrue 8%.

I am trying to achieve this by using 2 condition tables within same access sequence:

  • Cond table 1: Condition contract / Material group
  • Cond table 2: Condition contract

I am entering both REA1 and RES1 in the condition contract:

  • Cond table 1: condition contract nr / material group A = 8%
  • Cond table 2: condition contract nr = 6%

Scenario: I only have business volume of sales of material within material group A.
Expectation: Both accruals and rebate would be posted with 8%
The issue I am encountering: At time of settlement both RES1 condition records are found, ending up in 14% instead of 8%. How can I set up my condition contract to achieve my goal? Business wants to avoid to enter all of the material groups, hence, I am trying to use multiple condition tables within one contract.

For the accruals, there is no issue, we can use the exclusive indicator in the access sequence together with routine 67.

Thank you.

entry.title: Unable to login SAP b1 HANA on server.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are not able to login on server SAP b1 HANA, showing Unhandled Exception.

@saptech @SAP 

Thanks,

Kuldeep

9811575888

entry.title: Re: What replaces field PROVO in /SAPSLL/CUHDSTA in GTS4EH?
entry.content: Exactly, the official documentation says: "The field /SAPSLL/CHDSTA~PROVO Previous Document Processing Status has been retired and is not part of the data migration."

entry.title: Re: ABAP Core Data Services: New syntax for extending CDS entities
entry.content:
Hello @AndreaUS ,

Thanks for the great blog. We are currently trying to extend existing CDS views with standard SAP fields on a SAP S4 Public Cloud develop environment. However, we keep running into a "Object type View Extend is not allowed in this system error. Is it not possible on Public Cloud to extend view with basis SAP fields? I recon we can extend views with YY1 custom fields. Would be strange to not have this option for standard fields.

entry.title: Re: Migration EC-CS to GR and Mapping
entry.content:
Hello @Eyal_Feiler,

CX17 and OB58 serve distinct purposes and are not directly connected in the context of ongoing Chart of Accounts (COA) maintenance.

Please refer to the SAP help below

SAP Help Portal – Chart of Accounts Maintenance: OverviewSAP Help Portal

SAP Help Portal – Manage Financial Statement Versions

Let me know if you need further information

Thank you, and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: RAP oData v4 JSON-Batch
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I am trying to create a JSON batch. Unfortunately, it doesn't quite work. The target is a RAP oData v4 service. Is this supported by RAP?

 

oData protocol: https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#_Toc31359018

@Andre_Fischer

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration into SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content: @FrankRiesner - Frank do we have any updated Blog for the Cloud Integration with latest BW4HANA release?

entry.title: Integration BDC - Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi,

We have experienced challenges integrating SuccessFactors with SAC or Datasphere. We are exploring whether BDC could help address some of these issues, particularly around connectivity and data consistency.

One of the main concerns is that in SuccessFactors, key data—such as headcount information—is dynamic and lacks built-in historical storage. As a result, we've had to implement workarounds to capture snapshots of employee data over time. Additionally, the integration with Datasphere is proving to be complex, especially due to the need for static parameter passing in OData queries, which limits flexibility.

Given these challenges, we would like to understand whether BDC can support more robust integration with SuccessFactors and potentially resolve these limitations. Does anyone have more information about the integration between BDC and Success Factors? Do the pre-built insight apps for Success Factors capture data over time? Where can I find more information?

entry.title: Re: How to transport ABAP code as inactive mode to production
entry.content: Due to some dependency we dont want to change existing code with new version on the day of takt merge.

entry.title: API for outgoing payment
entry.content:
We need the "outgoing payment's" API. Is it possible to post and clear using Apps Post an outgoing payment with the API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: API for outgoing payment
entry.content:
For app "Post Outgoing Payments", there is no specific API available.
If you want to post and clear supplier-related accounts, you can try to use 'Journal Entry – Post' and 'Journal Entry – Clearing' to see if they meet your needs.

 

Guidelines for API Journal Entry – Post
Payload Examples for API Journal Entry – Post
Guidelines for API Journal Entry – Clearing

entry.title: Re: Mandatory Fields for CSV Import
entry.content:
Hello Eva,

Thank you very much for such a swift and insightful response. The second solution was exactly what I was looking for.

Kind regards,
A.
